name: Tavern Wall Lamp: Hovering Hallway Light
description: A bright wall-mounted lamp that is all around The Flagship. It is typically hung along the hallways for illumination. Suspended by pure white cords, it can give the impression from a distance that it is hovering in the hallway. Such design makes the lamp susceptible to surrounding vibrations, which can cause it to sway slightly. Experienced bartenders can even keep an eye out for trouble brewing at the tavern simply by observing the flickering of the lamp's light.
